title: Chi si ferma è perduto
writer: Bruno Corbucci, Giovanni Grimaldi, Mario Guerra
actors: Totò, Peppino De Filippo, Aroldo Tieri
plot: After their boss' death, two clerks eagerly await the arrival of the next one, each one of them hoping to become the apple of his eye. They compete in every possible way to impress him, which causes lots of trouble and many misund...
